name: notte
description: Browser automation and AI agent skills for Notte. Run real cloud or local browsers, scrape JavaScript-rendered pages with Pydantic-typed output, drive multi-step workflows behind auth and captchas, and deploy any browser automation as a scheduled, API-callable Notte Function. Use when building browser automations, web scraping pipelines, or agent-driven web workflows.

plugins.name: notte-cli
plugins.description: CLI commands for managing browser sessions, accounts, and Functions with the Notte CLI. Use when working with the notte command-line tool.

plugins.name: notte-sdks
plugins.description: SDK skills for building browser automation and agent workflows with Notte's Python SDK and MCP server. Use when writing code to control browsers programmatically with Notte.
